archetype: Modified Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) + Luxury (Archetype 5) - Futuristic AI Native

rules: Headings must have tight tracking (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use 2-3x more spacing (p-8, p-12, py-20, py-32).
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Grid items must be direct children. Use col-span variations to break symmetry.
spacing_and_layout.optical_alignment: Left-align dense text, center-align hero text if appropriate.
spacing_and_layout.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark) with 1px delicate inner stroke.

components_strategy.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary buttons use brand purple, pill-shaped (rounded-full) for voice agent triggers, glowing hover state shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.5)].
components_strategy.cards: Subtle border (border-border/40), flat background, hover lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle glow for dark cards.
components_strategy.voice_agent_ui: Animated concentric circles (ping/pulse effect) around the mic icon, indicating active listening state.
components_strategy.chat_ui: WhatsApp/iMessage style. Light left side (features copy), Dark right side (chat UI itself). Bubble styling with border-radius variations for sender/receiver.
components_strategy.mascot: Floating element with z-50, follows scroll (using Framer Motion useScroll or sticky), cute robot guide.
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Textarea for the Demo Modal.

mascot.description: Please use a high-quality SVG robot illustration or emoji representation if no exact image is provided, ensuring it looks like a 'cute blue glossy robot with headphones'.

animations_and_interactions.voice_waves: Use Framer Motion to animate varying height bars (music visualizer style) while the agent 'speaks'.
animations_and_interactions.multi_agent_diagram: Animated SVG paths (stroke-dashoffset or motion.path) to show data flowing from Central Orchestrator to Specialist Agents.
animations_and_interactions.hover_reveal: For Industry Solution cards, default state shows icon/title, hover state expands or flips to show challenges/ROI.
animations_and_interactions.live_chat: Staggered entrance animations for chat bubbles to simulate live typing.
animations_and_interactions.mascot_float: Framer Motion y-axis repeating float animation (y: [0, -10, 0]).

data_testid_guidelines.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Bricolage Grotesque and Manrope from Google Fonts.
Build a one-page architecture with smooth scrolling to sections.
The Hero section must have a light purple gradient background, black text, with Ava's avatar and a prominent 'Speak' button.
The Multi-Agent section must be deep black with glowing purple connection lines.
The Live Chat section must be a split layout: Light content on the left, dark chat interface on the right.
Create the Mascot as a fixed floating element in the bottom right or left corner.
For the BYOP Framework, create a visual funnel/convergence graphic using pure CSS/SVG.
Ensure all accessibility (ARIA, contrast) and responsive rules are met.
